allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json for line in sys.stdin: try: obj = json.loads\(line\) msg = json.dumps\(obj\) if ''bevy_sequence'' in msg.lower\(\) or ''github.com'' in msg.lower\(\): # Extract just the relevant text if ''content'' in obj: content = obj[''content''] if isinstance\(content, str\) and \(''bevy_sequence'' in content.lower\(\) or ''github'' in content.lower\(\)\): print\(content[:2000]\) print\(''---''\) elif isinstance\(content, list\): for item in content: if isinstance\(item, dict\): text = json.dumps\(item\) if ''bevy_sequence'' in text.lower\(\) or ''github'' in text.lower\(\): if ''text'' in item: print\(item[''text''][:2000]\) print\(''---''\) except: pass ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json for line in sys.stdin: try: obj = json.loads\(line\) msg = json.dumps\(obj\) if ''sequence'' in msg.lower\(\) and \(''git'' in msg.lower\(\) or ''crate'' in msg.lower\(\) or ''cargo'' in msg.lower\(\)\): if isinstance\(obj.get\(''content''\), list\): for item in obj[''content'']: if isinstance\(item, dict\) and ''text'' in item: t = item[''text''] if ''sequence'' in t.lower\(\): print\(t[:3000]\) print\(''===''\) elif isinstance\(obj.get\(''content''\), str\): c = obj[''content''] if ''sequence'' in c.lower\(\): print\(c[:3000]\) print\(''===''\) except: pass ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json for i, line in enumerate\(sys.stdin\): try: obj = json.loads\(line\) role = obj.get\(''role'', ''''\) content = obj.get\(''content'', ''''\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for item in content: if isinstance\(item, dict\) and item.get\(''type''\) == ''text'': text = item[''text''] if ''sequence'' in text.lower\(\): print\(f''Line {i}, role={role}: {text[:500]}''\) print\(''---''\) elif isinstance\(content, str\) and ''sequence'' in content.lower\(\): print\(f''Line {i}, role={role}: {content[:500]}''\) print\(''---''\) except: pass ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json with open\(''/Users/connormccluskey/.claude/projects/-Users-connormccluskey-Documents-projects-lobs/99f14d49-4d14-4c3c-8745-9fa4caec3297.jsonl''\) as f: for i, line in enumerate\(f\): obj = json.loads\(line\) s = json.dumps\(obj\) if ''sequence'' in s.lower\(\): print\(f''LINE {i}: found sequence mention, role={obj.get\(""role"",""?""\)}''\) ")
